---
title: "quarto-revealjs.pptx"
author: "Emil Hvitfeldt"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
---

## Introduction

Welcome to this presentation!

- First point
- Second point
- Third point

## Slide with Code

```python
def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")

def greet(name):
    message = f"Hello, {name}!"
    print(message)
    return message

if __name__ == "__main__":
    hello_world()
    greet("Alice")
```

## Slide with Image

![A beautiful scene](image.jpg)

## ggplot2 Example

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| output-location: column
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 4
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt,
                   y = mpg,
                   color = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "MPG vs Weight",
       x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
       y = "Miles per Gallon",
       color = "Cylinders") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## gt Table Example

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| output-location: column
library(gt)

mtcars |>
  head(5) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Motor Trend Cars",
    subtitle = "Top 5 rows"
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(mpg, disp, hp),
    decimals = 1
  )
```

## LaTeX Example

Inline math: $E = mc^2$

Display math:

$$
\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2} dx = \sqrt{\pi}
$$

Matrix notation:

$$
\mathbf{A} = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ 3 & 4 \end{bmatrix}
$$

## Absolute Positioning

![](img1.jpg){.absolute top=50 left=50 width="200"}

![](img2.jpg){.absolute top=100 right=50 width="200"}

![](img3.jpg){.absolute bottom=50 left=300 width="200"}
